transcript: Pipsy Painthoof is a 7-mana 4-4 Legendary with a Deathrattle to summon a Divine Shield, Rush, and Taunt minion from our deck. So in a big paladin deck like this, she can potentially summon Tyrian, Kulagarn, and Annoy a Troop, which is not bad for 7-mana. But sometimes Pipsy actually costs less than 7-mana, with Alarmed Security Bot, a 4-mana Deathrattle minion that draws a minion from our deck and makes it a 5-mana 5-5. We're also Kangor Dancing King, a 5-mana Legendary with a Deathrattle to swap itself with a minion from our hand.
